selection_policy: Bulk OOD/OE internet takviye after split review. Staged only; excludes exact hashes already in target runtime datasets or existing internet candidate pool. Sources are Bugwood/Invasive.org, Wikimedia Commons, and public GitHub dataset URLs with provenance fields. Existing repo-local internet candidates were also reused when live network continuation was blocked, preserving original source_url/source_page. Final fill uses OE-only cross-crop negatives from existing internet candidates; not final OOD evidence.
